title: rubus radula var. polybelus
intro: Rubus radula var. polybelus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry vine, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus radula var. polybelus include potential uses in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and may also help reduce blood sugar levels. Rubus radula var. polybelus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
